name: Chile Corn & Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Tarragon vinegar OR White wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add diced green bell pepper and red bell pepper to the skillet.
4. Stir-fry vegetables for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in chile pepper and vinegar.
6. Cook just long enough to warm through, about 1 minute.
7. Serve hot.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
CAL: 96; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 21g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 6mg; FAT: 2g
